info.title: Comet REST API
info.description: Comet ML REST API for experiment tracking, model registry, project management, and ML workflow automation. Provides comprehensive read and write endpoints for managing ML experiments, metrics, parameters, assets, registry models, artifacts, panels, dashboards, webhooks, and service accounts.

get.description: Get a page of projects by query.
Get a project's columns that can be queried.
Get the git metadata of an experiment.
Get the git patch of an experiment.
Get an experiment's stdout and stderr.
Get all metric values for a metric name.

parameters.name: type
